title: Of Steam and Magic
description: A lightweight kitchen-sink modpack with a mixture of tech, magic and exploration.
body:
A lightweight kitchen-sink modpack with a mixture of tech, magic and exploration. Includes the ability to activate shaders through Oculus and Embeddium if desired.

Several Quality of Life mods, performance enhancers and additional decoration mods included. 

Keep in mind that large Create builds have a high impact on the performance of a server or single player world. The pack is therefore only "lightweight" up to a certain point.

Main content mods:

- [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra)
- [Alex’s Mobs](https://modrinth.com/mod/alexs-mobs)
- [Blue Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/blue-skies)
- [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) (with several Addons)
- [Dimensional Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/dimensional-dungeons)
- [Farmer’s Delight](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight)
- Macaw’s Mods (such as [Furniture](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight))
- [Primal Magick](https://modrinth.com/mod/primal-magick)
- [Quark](https://modrinth.com/mod/quark)
- Yung’s Mods (such as [Better Dungeons](https://modrinth.com/mod/yungs-better-dungeons))
